trackerPile.name: Newspaper Exposé
trackerPile.effect: When revealed as a face-up market card: +1 to End Game Tracker. Remove from game to tracker pile. Draw replacement card.

reward.text: Gain $1 per stock card you currently hold
At the end of the game, gain $6

hand.ability: When gained, decrease any stock by 1
When gained, decrease any stock by 1
When gained, increase any stock by 1

market.name: The Squeeze
market.description: Increase one stock by +2 OR decrease one stock by -2

market.ability: When sold, draw an unused Insider Tip Action

market.name: Stock Certificate Forgery
market.description: Complete any one goal using one fewer card than required

market.name: Preferred Bidder
market.description: For rest of game, when you tie the winning bid, you win

market.ability: When gained, Yellow +1. When sold, Yellow -1

mainDeck.name: Newspaper Exposé
mainDeck.effect: When revealed as a face-up market card: +1 to End Game Tracker. Remove from game to tracker pile. Draw replacement card.

mainDeck.ability: When gained, Blue +1. When sold, Blue -1
When gained, decrease any stock by 1
When gained, increase any stock by 1
When sold, draw an unused Insider Tip Action
When gained, increase any stock by 1

mainDeck.name: Corner the Market
mainDeck.description: Take any face-up stock from market for free

mainDeck.ability: When gained, Purple +1. When sold, Purple -1
When gained, decrease any stock by 1

discardPile.name: Hostile Takeover
discardPile.description: Choose another player, look at their hand, take 1 stock of your choice. They receive $5 from the bank

discardPile.ability: When gained, increase any stock by 1

discardPile.name: Pump and Dump
discardPile.description: Sell 1 stock at double its current price immediately

discardPile.ability: When sold, draw an unused Insider Tip Action

discardPile.name: Tipster's Choice
discardPile.description: Draw 2 cards from deck, keep 1, return other to bottom

discardPile.ability: When gained, Orange +1. When sold, Orange -1
When sold, draw an unused Insider Tip Action

reward.text: Adjust any one stock by +2 and another stock by -2

log: Game initialized with 3 players, 39 cards in deck, 5 in market, tracker at 0/9.
T1: Carnegie auctions Orange stock_up (stock-13), wins at $7. Boosts Orange to $6. Wild Speculation revealed in market.
T2: Vanderbilt auctions Orange blank (stock-11), wins at $8. Hostile Takeover revealed in market.
T3: Morgan auctions Hostile Takeover (action-41), wins at $7. Connected Broker revealed in market.
T4: Carnegie auctions Orange blank (stock-9), wins at $9. Yellow blank revealed in market.
T5: Vanderbilt auctions Orange blank (stock-10), wins at $9. Yellow stock_down revealed in market.
T6: Morgan plays Hostile Takeover on Carnegie, takes Orange stock_up (stock-13). Carnegie gets $5. Morgan boosts Yellow to $6.
T7: Carnegie plays insider tip 'Orange +2 / Yellow +1' (itip-50). Orange $6->$8, Yellow $6->$7. Tracker 1/9.
T8: Vanderbilt plays insider tip 'Orange +2 / Yellow -1' (itip-54). Orange $8->$10, Yellow $7->$6. Tracker 2/9.
T9: Morgan sells Orange stock_up (stock-13) for $10.
T10: Carnegie sells Orange blank (stock-9) for $10.
T11: Vanderbilt sells Orange blank (stock-11) for $10.
T12: Morgan plays insider tip 'Orange -2 / Yellow +1' (itip-57). Orange $10->$8, Yellow $6->$7. Tracker 3/9.
T13: Carnegie auctions Yellow blank (stock-18), wins at $9. Pump and Dump revealed in market.
T14: Vanderbilt auctions Pump and Dump (action-35), Carnegie wins at $8. Yellow blank revealed in market.
T15: Morgan auctions Yellow blank (stock-20), wins at $8. Purple insider revealed in market.
T16: Carnegie plays Pump and Dump, sells Yellow blank (stock-18) at double for $14.
T17: Vanderbilt plays insider tip 'Blue -2 / Orange +1' (itip-56). Orange $8->$9, Blue $5->$3. Tracker 4/9.
T18: Morgan auctions Yellow stock_down (stock-22), wins at $8. Decreases Orange to $8. Crisis card revealed during refill! Tracker 5/9. Purple blank replaces it.
T19: Carnegie auctions Purple insider (stock-32), wins at $7. Another Purple blank revealed in market.
T20: Vanderbilt sells Orange blank (stock-10) for $8.
T21: Morgan auctions Purple blank (stock-27), Carnegie wins at $8. Blue blank revealed in market.
T22: Carnegie sells Purple insider (stock-32) for $5, draws 'Blue -3' (itip-45) from insider tip deck.
T23: Vanderbilt auctions Tipster's Choice (action-33), wins at $3. Blue blank revealed in market.
T24: Carnegie auctions Blue blank (stock-3), wins at $1 (nobody contested). Yellow insider revealed in market.
T25: Vanderbilt plays Tipster's Choice, draws Purple stock_down + Orange blank, keeps Orange blank (stock-12, $8).
T26: Morgan auctions Purple blank (stock-28), wins at $7. Yellow hype revealed in market.
T27: Carnegie sells Purple blank (stock-27) for $5.
T28: Vanderbilt sells Orange blank (stock-12) for $8.
T29: Morgan auctions Yellow insider (stock-24), wins at $8. Purple stock_up revealed in market.
T30: Carnegie auctions Blue blank (stock-1), wins at $1. Orange hype revealed in market.
T31: Vanderbilt auctions Orange hype (stock-15), wins at $1. Orange $8->$9. Blue stock_down revealed in market.
T32: Morgan claims 3 Yellow goal (goal-65). Gains $4 ($1 per 4 stocks held). Tracker 6/9.
T33: Carnegie auctions Blue stock_down (stock-6), wins at $8. Decreases Yellow $7->$6. Blue blank revealed in market.
T34: Vanderbilt sells Orange hype (stock-15) for $9. Orange $9->$8 (hype penalty).
T35: Morgan auctions Purple stock_up (stock-29), wins at $5. Boosts Yellow $6->$7. Preferred Bidder revealed in market.
T36: Carnegie claims 3 Blue goal (goal-63). Steals $1 from Vanderbilt and $1 from Morgan. Tracker 7/9.
T37: Vanderbilt auctions Connected Broker (action-36), Carnegie wins at $2. Orange insider revealed in market.
T38: Morgan claims 2Y+2P goal (goal-72). Gains $6 end-game bonus. Tracker 8/9.
T39: Carnegie plays Connected Broker (persistent: +$1 per sell).
T40: Vanderbilt auctions Blue blank (stock-2), wins at $1. Stock Certificate Forgery revealed in market.
T41: Morgan sells Yellow insider (stock-24) for $7. Draws insider tip 'Blue +2 / Orange +1' (itip-49).
T42: Carnegie sells Blue blank (stock-3) for $4 ($3 + $1 Connected Broker).
T43: Vanderbilt auctions Wild Speculation (action-38), Morgan wins at $1. The Squeeze revealed in market.
T44: Morgan plays Wild Speculation, flips Yellow blank (stock-19). Chooses +3. Yellow $7->$10!
T45: Carnegie sells Blue blank (stock-1) for $4 ($3 + $1 Connected Broker).
T46: Vanderbilt auctions Preferred Bidder (action-39), wins at $1. CRISIS CARD (crisis-44) drawn as replacement! Tracker 9/9. GAME OVER!
FINAL: Vanderbilt $44, Morgan $42 (incl $6 end-game bonus), Carnegie $22. Vanderbilt wins!
